creator: bogus19@veggiechinese.net
text:
Sure, I get that it's a change in how FreeBSD's Perl install works,  but the effect is the same -- the port won't install with FreeBSD's Perl previous to whatever version that change was made in, even if it will technically "work" once installed.

I installed 5.18, and I'm working on getting the various dependencies upgraded (the one-liner in UPDATING didn't work for me). Anyway, you can feel free to close this; I'll get it to work somehow.
